title: Nikola the Servant Girl
overview: Nikola is content to live a normal life in her small, tranquil village... until the day a curious man named Haga arrives. Haga claims to be "investigating" the world, and his quest to do so will open Nikola's eyes to all kinds of unseen wonders!

title: Haga Makoto
overview: After what she's been through, Nikola is now determined to join Haga on his quest to debug the world and become a King's Seeker herself! Haga has no idea what to make of this development, so he reluctantly agrees to take her with him.

title: Tesla
overview: After a nasty encounter with some fellow debuggers, Haga takes Nikola to the Advent Altar to teach her an invaluable lesson about abusing the power of the debugger stones.

title: Isora Amano
overview: Haga and Nikola stumble across a buggy forgotten village in the remote reaches of the country. There, they meet an interesting character by the name of Isora Amano who has some alarming information on the other debuggers.

title: Infiltration
overview: Now that the evil debuggers have crossed him, Amano readily joins Haga and Nikola in the name of revenge. Their destination? The debugger's base: Bayle Castle!

title: The Mad King
overview: The party works their way through the game's main story in order to get close to the evil debuggers.

title: The Boss
overview: Haga and his friends confront the evil debuggers at the main gate of the castle.

title: Console Command
overview: Amano receives an offer from an unexpected source, while Haga looks for a new weapon for Nikola.

title: Akira Kagami
overview: Haga and the crew meet a new friend, and a very unusual boy...

title: Gaydle and Yamanaka
overview: Haga learns more about what happened to Gaydle, while the village fighters try to treat him as a threat.

title: Alba
overview: As the party flees from Gaydle, Nikola refuses to wake up.

title: The Diamond
overview: Haga and the others are teleported to the bottom of a massive dungeon.

title: Silence
overview: Trapped at the bottom of a deadly dungeon, Haga and his party must take incredible risks to escape.
